overall.description: First-person exploration of a cyberpunk nightclub from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring neon-lit bar areas, a crowded dance floor, narrow corridors with provocative signage, and private booths with holographic dancers. The footage showcases the game's signature purple and cyan neon aesthetic in an indoor commercial entertainment venue.

notable_agents.action: bartender standing behind the counter facing the camera
patron in bright pink jacket sitting on bar stool

entered.detail: long white-glowing bar counter with drinks and glasses arranged on surface
cyan and purple fluorescent tube lights running along the ceiling
wall-mounted shelves with various bottles behind the bar
decorative metal grid wall with geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a cyberpunk bar counter illuminated with white and cyan neon lights. A bartender stands behind the counter to the left while a patron in a distinctive pink jacket sits at the bar to the right. The background features extensive bottle shelving and geometric metal wall panels.

scene_state.functional_zone: main dance floor and social area

events.description: moving from the narrow bar area into the open club floor space

agents.ego_description: navigating through the main club area past groups of socializing patrons

entered.detail: open area with reflective flooring and ambient neon accent lighting
second level with metal railings overlooking the main floor
tall pink neon light strips running vertically along the walls

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the bar into the main club area featuring a spacious dance floor with scattered groups of patrons. Pink neon pillars line the left side while an upper balcony overlooks the space from above. The crowd density increases as the camera moves through the social area toward the back of the club.

scene_state.functional_zone: back corridor with private room entrances

events.description: entering the narrow back corridor from the main club area
entering a private booth through hanging beaded curtains

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrow corridor lined with neon signs and entering a private booth with holographic entertainment

blue and pink neon sign depicting intertwined gender symbols

doorways with green neon trim leading to private booths
hanging circular discs forming a curtain at the booth entrance
semi-transparent blue-green hologram of a dancer performing on a platform
circular table with bottles and glasses
curved bench seating along the walls

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrow corridor bathed in intense pink neon light, featuring provocative neon signage including gender symbols and a condom package. The camera passes doorways to private rooms before entering one through a beaded curtain, revealing a holographic dancer performing on a central table.

events.description: exiting first private booth back into the neon corridor
entering a second private booth through beaded curtains

agents.ego_description: walking through the corridor and observing holographic dancers in private booths

notable_agents.action: holographic dancer performing on a table
seated patron watching the holographic performance

entered.detail: similar enclosed space with holographic dancer and seating

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the first private booth back into the neon-lit corridor, then proceeds to enter a second private booth. Inside, another holographic dancer performs on a central table while patrons sit on curved benches. The beaded curtain marks the transition between the corridor and the intimate booth spaces.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the bright, open atmosphere of a cyberpunk bar into the intimate, neon-drenched privacy of secluded club booths. It begins by gliding along a bar counter illuminated in white and cyan, passing a bartender and a patron in a pink jacket against a backdrop of geometric metal panels. As the camera moves away from the counter, the space expands into a crowded dance floor characterized by pink neon pillars and an overlooking balcony. The scene then shifts into a narrow, intensely pink corridor lined with provocative signage before passing through a beaded curtain to reveal a holographic dancer on a central table. Finally, the camera retreats back into the corridor and enters a second private booth, where another holographic performance unfolds for patrons seated on curved benches.
